section_name: Prohibition of imposition and collection of a fine, penalty, forfeiture, fee or surcharge
article_title: Penalties & Disposition of Fines and Forfeitures
text: A municipality may only impose a fine, penalty, forfeiture, or any other fee or surcharge against a person charged with a violation of this chapter or any local law, ordinance, order, rule, regulation or administrative code adopted pursuant to this chapter if such person is convicted of or found liable for a violation of this chapter or any local law, ordinance, order, rule, regulation or administrative code adopted pursuant to this chapter in satisfaction of such charge.
markdown:
# Vehicle & Traffic Law
## Title 9
#### Article 45. Penalties & Disposition of Fines and Forfeitures
##### § 1804 — Prohibition of imposition and collection of a fine, penalty, forfeiture, fee or surcharge

A municipality may only impose a fine, penalty, forfeiture, or any other fee or surcharge against a person charged with a violation of this chapter or any local law, ordinance, order, rule, regulation or administrative code adopted pursuant to this chapter if such person is convicted of or found liable for a violation of this chapter or any local law, ordinance, order, rule, regulation or administrative code adopted pursuant to this chapter in satisfaction of such charge.

*Last modified: Mar. 25, 2016*
